# Vendored provider bundle

This directory contains the compiled `@p-stream/providers` bundle from
[`xp-technologies-dev/providers`](https://github.com/xp-technologies-dev/providers)
commit `0cec62538f1aee5bb785b89f26ca76bac87ce796`.

It is vendored so a clean JameStream install does not execute a nested package
manager or depend on a mutable Git branch during installation. The upstream
provider project is MIT-licensed; its license notice is included here.

Review upstream changes and applicable source terms before replacing this
bundle. JameStream does not automatically update it.
